bugs.title: Missing verification of identity
bugs.evidence: User: I just need your 1st and last name to get started.
bugs.why_it_matters: The agent did not ask for identifying information before scheduling the appointment, which is crucial for patient verification and safety.
bugs.recommendation: Ensure the agent asks for the patient's name and date of birth before proceeding to book an appointment.

bugs.title: Inaccurate appointment confirmation
bugs.evidence: You're booked for Tuesday. June 30th at 10 30 AM. With doctor z Big New Lucost.
bugs.why_it_matters: The agent did not confirm the appointment clearly and contained inaccuracies in the doctor's name.
bugs.recommendation: The agent should repeat back the appointment details accurately and clearly to confirm with the patient.

bugs.title: Suggesting unavailable times
bugs.evidence: the earliest available times are 3 PM and 3 30 PM.
bugs.why_it_matters: The agent offered times that were not aligned with the user's request for morning slots.
bugs.recommendation: Ensure the agent only suggests available slots that meet the user's requests.

overall_notes: The agent's handling of the appointment scheduling was insufficient due to failure in verifying the patient's identity, confirming the correct details, and providing accurate time slots based on the user's needs.
